name: JSF++: Shall Deviation Documented In File
description: Each deviation from a 'shall' rule is documented in the file that contains the deviation.
rationale: JSF++ AV Rule 6: each deviation from a 'shall' rule shall be documented in the file that contains the deviation; deviations from this rule are not allowed.
source: JSF Air Vehicle C++ Coding Standards (Lockheed Martin, Doc. 2RDU00001 Rev C, Dec 2005). https://www.stroustrup.com/JSF-AV-rules.pdf
